name: VBAO
author: automata-rtx
description: VBAO (Visibility Bitmask Ambient Occlusion): a 32-sector visibility-bitmask occlusion estimator (handles thin geometry like grass without overdarkening) with temporal accumulation, depth-aware upscaling, and thickness/contrast controls. A distinct technique from Encounter's GTAO demo mod, whose framework it was originally derived from (Bevy Engine SSAO / Intel XeGTAO).
